/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/untitled_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/nod.cpp.o -o untitled -F/Users/romanphil/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/romanphil/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib /Users/romanphil/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
